name: DSCC Breaking News
subject: NYT: Trump asked Comey to stop investigating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The New York Times reports that President Donald Trump asked FBI Director Comey to stop investigating his administration's ties to Russia.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e780/2b07114c/53aeba54/736e28ff/1321416914/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-a-special-prosecutor?source=PT-20170516-Breaking-ProsHV")

Team,

Hours ago, _The New York Times_ reported an outrageous new revelation about the FBI's Russia investigation:

James Comey kept a paper trail of his conversations with President Trump, and according to a memo he wrote as FBI Director, **Trump asked Comey to stop the investigation into national security adviser Mike Flynn's Russia ties, saying:**

**_" I hope you can let this go."_**
Just as we wrap our heads around the fact that Trump leaked classified information to Russian officials this week, we learn he allegedly tried to shut down an active investigation into his campaign and administration.

[**We need an independent investigation that Trump can 't shut down and an investigator he can't fire. Add your name right now to demand a special prosecutor.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e780/2b07114c/53aeba54/736e28ff/1321416914/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-a-special-prosecutor?source=PT-20170516-Breaking-ProsHV")

President Trump trying to shut down the FBI's ongoing investigation could be an obstruction of justice.

We need to immediately verify what happened in Trump's meeting with Comey.

And above all, we need to make sure that the investigation into the Trump administration's relationship with Russia continues without any more interference.

**The American people must demand answers through an independent investigation. Add your name to call for a special prosecutor Trump can 't fire or intimidate:**

[**http://dscc.org/special-prosecutor-now**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e780/2b07114c/53aeba54/736e28ff/1321416914/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/demand-a-special-prosecutor?source=PT-20170516-Breaking-ProsHV")

Thanks,

Team DSCC

**A note on your support, team:**

Senate Democrats are the first line of defense against the Trump administration. We're hard at work readying resources for the fights ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, we mean it when we say we're counting on you.

Please consider making a contribution of any amount today.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170516-Breaking-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e780/2b07114c/53aeba54/736e28f9/1321416914/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e780/2b07114c/53aeba54/736e28f8/1321416914/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e780/2b07114c/53aeba54/736e28fb/1321416914/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Greg's iPhone
subject: FWD: update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana
body:
Greg for Montana

Friend - I wanted to drop you a quick note.

I'm in the car headed to my next event in Billings and my
campaign manager informed me that we are more than $10,000 short
of our goal.

Friend - I wanted to drop you a quick note.

I'm in the car headed to my next event in Missoula and my
campaign manager informed me that we are more than $10,000 short
of our goal.

My opponent is boosting his fundraising efforts - he has already
met his goal and then some. We are in the final stretch of this
race and I know that you can help us get over the finish line -
just 8 days from today.

We need 26 more people in 59937 to give $50 in the next 48
hours.

Thank you, Friend, for doing me this personal favor.

-Greg

Sent from iPhone

From: Brock Lowrance
To: Greg Gianforte
Date: Wednesday, May 17, 2017
Subject: Update

Hey Greg,

Quick update: close to meeting our goal, but still need 26 people
in 59937 to give $50 or more to get over the top.

Will update again in a few hours.

Brock

Campaign Manager
Greg for Montana

Paid for by Greg for Montana

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: I have a question for you
body:
And the answer is vitally important to the future of our nation.

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

What's the greatest threat to our nation?

You may think it's the progressive ideology
that undermines Christian values. But it's not.

The greatest danger we face is believing our
fight is over after the last election!

We must stay vigilant - and My Faith Votes is
committed to doing everything in our power to ensure Christians
vote in local and national elections and stay engaged on issues
that matter.

That's why your gift today is important.
Because every election - from the local school board to the
nation's President - has a consequence. And if we don't stay
involved, our country and our rights will be at risk.

Consider these real-life consequences:

Twelve states require no parental
involvement in a minor's decision to have an abortion.
Eight states have now legalized marijuana
for recreational use, and the list is growing.
Elementary school children in districts
across the nation are being taught a progressive view of gender
identity, sexual orientation, and safe sex.
And so many more!

What do each of these have in common? They
are the outcome of local and state elections.

Yes, even local elections have consequences.
That's why we must be engaged and act on our faith.

But too many people - too many Christians -
stay home and let others choose what will happen in our
communities. I recently learned that less than 20% of eligible
voters show up for local elections!

That can change. My Faith Votes is getting
people of faith across the nation involved and fighting for our
values. We reached tens of millions of Christians with this
message in the last election, and it's only through your help
that we can continue.

Thank you for your needed support today!

Sincerely,
Jason Yates
CEO
My Faith Votes

My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement
focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in
local and national elections and be active members of society. By
partnering with local churches, pastors and national faith
leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and resources Christians to
lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and
politics.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iskYDwh2Ne

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oskYDwh2Ne

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-44037318668-echo3-FFA5F4C2132B020890B1104C38C11334@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Your invitation to be part of Resistance Summer:
body:
Be a part of Resistance Summer.
---
**Sign up today to learn how you can get involved with Resistance Summer.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Resistance-Summer2?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170517_ke_nd2&source=em_20170517_ke_nd2")**

Here's something I think we can all agree on: no one should ever feel like Democrats are taking their vote for granted.

So this summer, we're embarking on a mission to organize in every zip code, from Maine to Hawai'i. **[We're calling it Resistance Summer, and I want to invite you to be part of it.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Resistance-Summer2?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Were+calling+it+Resistance+Summer+and+I+&utm_campaign=em_20170517_ke_nd2&source=em_20170517_ke_nd2")**

Tom and I have met with thousands of folks all over the country who are fed up with Trump and his GOP allies in Congress, and they're fired up to defeat them. But we've also heard loud and clear from supporters like you that the Democratic Party needs to be invested in our communities all the time -- not just during election season.

So here's our plan: we're going to mobilize our grassroots supporters in every corner of the country by organizing, training volunteers, building neighborhood teams, and making smart, localized investments that address every community's unique needs and issues.

This is how we win back control of state legislatures, governor's mansions, Congress, and the White House -- together, and one seat at a time.

**We can't do this without you, so I'm asking you to get involved. Add your name to learn more about Resistance Summer, and we'll keep you in the loop about what's happening in your community:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Resistance-Summer2?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170517_ke_nd2&source=em_20170517_ke_nd2")**
Thanks,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce6f/4067b0a/2871ff637/7e767252/3108224168/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170517_ke_nd2&source=em_20170517_ke_nd2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce6f/4067b0a/2871ff637/7e767253/3108224168/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170517_ke_nd2&source=em_20170517_ke_nd2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce6f/4067b0a/2871ff637/7e767250/3108224168/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170517_ke_nd2&source=em_20170517_ke_nd2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce6f/4067b0a/2871ff637/7e767251/3108224168/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170517_ke_nd2&source=em_20170517_ke_nd2"), or just reply to this email! name: Brice Barnes
subject: paid parental leave
body:
all parents deserve this
#
Team --
If you saw our email yesterday, you know that Mayor Gillum and First Lady R.Jai just welcomed their third child, Davis Allen Gillum, into the world. And although it's a little unorthodox for a candidate to take leave from the campaign trail, we've encouraged Andrew to do just that -- because we know how it important it is for parents to have that time with a new baby.
Unfortunately, that isn't something afforded to many new parents. In fact, according to the Department of Labor, **94% of low income parents have no access to paid parental leave.** A quarter of all new moms in the United States go back to work after just 10 days.
[**If you agree that all parents in Florida should have access to paid leave to spend time with their newborn babies, add your name to our petition now >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb335c/9e00690/485f4b82/240375bb/1733726618/VEsH/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/support-paid-parental-leave")
Right now, we are the _only_ nation with an advanced economy in the world that doesn't mandate any paid parental leave. And while we can't do anything about that nationally, we can certainly work to ensure that Florida parents get the paid parental leave they need for themselves and their families.
As a mom to two young boys, this issue hits home for me. I know that a 2011 study showed that providing 10 additional weeks of paid parental leave can reduce infant mortality rates by up to 10%. I know that it takes new moms more than 10 days to recover from giving birth. And I don't think any of this should be a partisan issue.
[**Add your name to our petition now, and help us ensure that all Florida parents have access to paid leave >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb335c/9e00690/485f4b82/240375bb/1733726618/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/support-paid-parental-leave")
Congratulations again to Andrew and R.Jai on their newest addition to the Gillum family!
Bring it home,
Brice Barnes
Deputy Campaign Manager
Andrew Gillum for Governor
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb335c/9e00690/485f4b82/240375ba/1733726618/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170517-parentalleave")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb335c/9e00690/485f4b82/240375bd/1733726618/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb335c/9e00690/485f4b82/240375bc/1733726618/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb335c/9e00690/485f4b82/240375bf/1733726618/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: We've got a problem in Florida, Peter
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78d7/24c69fd9/eba5c70c/18e51e28/3656850896/VEsH/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFC522N_digital_email_20170517_GwenGrahamstandalone_inactS&source=WQEFC522N_digital_email_20170517_GwenGrahamstandalone_inactS")
---

| | Peter,

We've got a problem in Florida.

Despite being a swing state, Florida hasn't had a Democratic governor in almost 20 years. And it's hurting Florida women.

One in five Florida women lives in a county without an abortion provider. Over the last few years, Republican Governor Rick Scott has attempted to defund Planned Parenthood by cutting state funding for any health care clinic that provides abortions.

It's time to stop the attacks on women and families. That's why we've endorsed pro-choice champion Gwen Graham in her bid to become the next governor of Florida.

**[We know flipping Florida won't be easy, so Gwen needs our support. Donate $3 now to her campaign-- 100% of your donation goes directly to her.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78d7/24c69fd9/eba5c70c/18e51e29/3656850896/VEsE/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/gwen-graham18?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+We+know+flipping+Florida+wont+be+easy+so&utm_campaign=WQEFC522N_digital_email_20170517_GwenGrahamstandalone_inactS&source=WQEFC522N_digital_email_20170517_GwenGrahamstandalone_inactS")**

Gwen is no stranger to overcoming the odds.

She put her name on the ballot for the first time in 2014 when gridlock in Congress opened up an opportunity to defeat an extreme Republican. That year, Gwen was one of only two Democrats in the country to flip a House seat from a sitting Republican. She was also the first woman to represent Florida's 2nd District.

We were with Gwen in her 2014 race, and we're proud to be with her now. She not only shares our values, she knows how to win a tough race. Gwen's got exactly what Democrats need to turn this governor's seat blue, but Florida is a notoriously expensive state to run in.

So she's counting on us to help her get off to a strong start.

**Donate $3 now to support Gwen for governor of Florida. 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Gwen-Strong-Start](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78d7/24c69fd9/eba5c70c/18e51e2a/3656850896/VEsF/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/gwen-graham18?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgGwenStrongStart&utm_campaign=WQEFC522N_digital_email_20170517_GwenGrahamstandalone_inactS&source=WQEFC522N_digital_email_20170517_GwenGrahamstandalone_inactS")**

Thank you,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78d7/24c69fd9/eba5c70c/18e51e2b/3656850896/VEsC/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/gwen-graham18?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFC522N_digital_email_20170517_GwenGrahamstandalone_inactS&source=WQEFC522N_digital_email_20170517_GwenGrahamstandalone_inactS")

|
---|---|---

# Our candidates have the power of our five-million-person movement behind them. 100% of your donation will go directly to their campaigns.

|

1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78d7/24c69fd9/eba5c70c/18e51e26/3656850896/VEsB/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFC522N_digital_email_20170517_GwenGrahamstandalone_inactS&source=WQEFC522N_digital_email_20170517_GwenGrahamstandalone_inactS"). name: alert@dscc.org
subject: NPR: Secret Republican Senate Talks Are Shaping Health Care Legislation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
NPR reported yesterday that Trump's firing of FBI Director Comey has given the GOP "breathing room" to pass Trumpcare.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170517-AlertDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

> _**NPR: Secret Republican Senate Talks Are Shaping Health Care Legislation**_
Team,

Senate Republicans are meeting behind closed doors to plot a path forward for repealing Obamacare.

In fact, _NPR_ reported this week that the focus on the FBI's Russia investigation hasn't stalled the Senate health care talks, but rather, _" given the Senate some breathing room to negotiate with so much attention focused elsewhere."_

**Team, we cannot let our focus slip.** It took mere hours for the House Obamacare repeal bill to go from an embarrassing failure to a passed bill -- and we're at risk of seeing the same thing happen now in the Senate.

[**That 's why we're running a six-figure ad buy targeting Republicans in key states. Chip in $1 now to fund our ads and show we're not letting up on the health care fight.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170517-AlertDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Our calls, our stories and our ads are how we fight back Obamacare repeal -- so if Republicans move forward anyway, we'll make sure they pay a price for it in 2018.

It's starting to work -- polls show that the majority of Americans oppose the GOP health care bill and don't want to see 24 million Americans lose coverage or see their health care costs skyrocket. Now we need to send that message of how many of us are watching.

**Don 't let Republicans hide behind closed doors. Chip in $1 now to fund our ads and keep up the pressure on health care:**

[**http://dscc.org/fight-the-secret-health-care-negotiations**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170517-AlertDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Together, we can make sure the GOP knows how high the cost of health care repeal will be.

Thanks,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e788/2b07114c/5385cf3d/736e1445/503666540/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e788/2b07114c/5385cf3d/736e1444/503666540/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e788/2b07114c/5385cf3d/736e1447/503666540/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Donnelly for Indiana
subject: "Trump's biggest cheerleader"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2647/7377f838/36029eb1/51fb4c5c/3250263428/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | **BREAKING: A GOP Congressman is mulling a run against Joe.
And he's a HUGE Trump fan.
[Chip in $5 to defeat him and reelect Joe for Indiana >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2647/7377f838/36029eb1/51fb4c5f/3250263428/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-maymm?refcode=20170517nd&amount=10")** Peter,

_Breaking news_ : Indiana Republican Congressman Luke Messer is rumored to be running against Joe in 2018. He's already formed a statewide finance committee (chaired by Mike Pence's brother) and raised $700,000 last quarter.

And according to the _South Bend Tribune_ , Messer **" sounded like one of [President] Trump's biggest cheerleaders"** at a recent GOP dinner.

Peter, now that this well-funded establishment Republican is strongly considering entering the race, **we need to turbo-charge our efforts to make sure Joe stays in the Senate to fight for Hoosiers.[Will you make a gift of $5 right away to help Joe build the foundation to take on the GOP money machine?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2647/7377f838/36029eb1/51fb4c5f/3250263428/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-maymm?refcode=20170517nd&amount=10")**

Messer has continued to be a cheerleader for Trump, even after:
* The constant scandals surrounding his administration's ties with Russia;
* The awful American Health Care Act that Trump endorsed, which would result in hundreds of thousands of Hoosiers losing care;
* His extreme and unqualified Cabinet choices, including Tom Price at Health and Human Services and Betsy DeVos at Education.

**We need real leaders in the Senate, not cheerleaders, if we 're going to prevent Trump and Republicans like Mitch McConnell from gaining the 60-seat majority they want so badly.**

**[Please, pitch in $5 to keep Joe in the Senate fighting for us.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2647/7377f838/36029eb1/51fb4c5f/3250263428/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-maymm?refcode=20170517nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,
Team Donnelly | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2647/7377f838/36029eb1/51fb4c5e/3250263428/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-maymm?refcode=20170517nd&amount=25")
---

|
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2647/7377f838/36029eb1/51fb4c59/3250263428/VEsA/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: Missing Marco Rubio (via FlaDems.com)
subject: it's serious, Marco
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Listen up:

Marco Rubio and his Republican collaborators are MIA: missing in action.

As Floridians demand an independent inquiry into accusations of Russian interference in our election - and possible Trump campaign collusion with Russian agents - Rubio has gone underground.

**Not acceptable.**

[**Demand Marco Rubio and the Republicans join us in calling for an independent investigation to find the truth. Add your name here.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2a6/1a5213b3/76546aaf/718bb1b7/1248686401/VEsH/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWbWFYSnpkRzVoYldVbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZzWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIiwiSlNWbGJXRnBiQ1VsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJKU1Y2YVhBbEpRPT0iOiIzNDIyMyIsIkpTVklUMDFGVUVoUFRrVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-an-independent-investigation-today?source=&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+Demand+Marco+Rubio+and+the+Republicans+j&utm_campaign=em051717") [DEMAND AN INDEPENDENT INVESTIGATION](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2a6/1a5213b3/76546aaf/718bb1b6/1248686401/VEsE/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWbWFYSnpkRzVoYldVbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZzWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIiwiSlNWbGJXRnBiQ1VsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJKU1Y2YVhBbEpRPT0iOiIzNDIyMyIsIkpTVklUMDFGVUVoUFRrVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-an-independent-investigation-today?source=&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+DEMAND+AN+INDEPENDENT+INVESTIGATION&utm_campaign=em051717") If they believe in fighting for democracy, Marco Rubio and the GOP must join us in demanding the truth.

Now is not the time for any leader of any political party to be MIA.

[**Add your name here to support an independent investigation.**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2a6/1a5213b3/76546aaf/718bb1b1/1248686401/VEsF/p/eyJKU1Z6YjNWeVkyVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWbWFYSnpkRzVoYldVbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZzWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIiwiSlNWbGJXRnBiQ1VsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJKU1Y2YVhBbEpRPT0iOiIzNDIyMyIsIkpTVklUMDFGVUVoUFRrVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://act.floridadems.org/page/s/demand-an-independent-investigation-today?source=&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&phone=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+here+to+support+an+indepen&utm_campaign=em051717")

Thank you,

FlaDems.com

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2a6/1a5213b3/76546aaf/718bb1b0/1248686401/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em051717&source=em051717") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Tom Perez
subject: We still need an independent investigation. Add your name:
body:
We need answers.
---
**Add your name: demand an independent investigation into Trump and Russia.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Demand-an-Independent-Investigation1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170517_tp_ns&source=em_20170517_tp_ns")**

Friend --

We just learned that the Department of Justice has appointed former FBI Director Robert Mueller as special prosecutor to oversee the investigation into Trump and Russia.

This new development underscores the seriousness of this investigation. Donald Trump didn't want this. The White House didn't want this. Republicans didn't want this.

**This happened because Americans spoke out.**

You spoke out -- there are more than 700,000 signatures on our petition demanding an independent investigation to get to the truth. And the will of the people cannot be ignored.

But this fight isn't over. Donald Trump has alrady made it his mission to end this investigation. To be sure the facts come out, we still need a truly independent commission -- outside of the Trump administration -- so the American people can get the answers we deserve about Russia's attack on our democracy, the potential collusion between Russia and the Trump campaign, and Trump's own interference in this investigation.

**Add your name to call for one today:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Demand-an-Independent-Investigation1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170517_tp_ns&source=em_20170517_tp_ns")**
We will all need to watch this closely to ensure that Trump keeps his hands off of this process. But for now, thanks for raising your voice to protect our democracy.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce67/4067b0a/2869baaf8/7e7661a3/1460733580/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170517_tp_ns&source=em_20170517_tp_ns"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce67/4067b0a/2869baaf8/7e7661a0/1460733580/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170517_tp_ns&source=em_20170517_tp_ns"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce67/4067b0a/2869baaf8/7e7661a1/1460733580/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170517_tp_ns&source=em_20170517_tp_ns") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052ce67/4067b0a/2869baaf8/7e7661ae/1460733580/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170517_tp_ns&source=em_20170517_tp_ns"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: We need answers. Add your name: demand an independent investigation into Trump and Russia. "" Friend -- We just learned that the Department of Justice has appointed former FBI Director Robert Mueller as special prosecutor to oversee the investigation into Trump and Russia. This new development underscores the seriousness of this investigation. Donald Trump didn't want this. The White House didn't want this. Republicans didn't want this. This happened because Americans spoke out. You spoke out -- there are more than 700,000 signatures on our petition demanding an independent investigation to get to the truth. And the will of the people cannot be ignored. But this fight isn't over. Donald Trump has alrady made it his mission to end this investigation. To be sure the facts come out, we still need a truly independent commission -- outside of the Trump administration -- so the American people can get the answers we deserve about Russia's attack on our democracy, the potential collusion between Russia and the Trump campaign, and Trump's own interference in this investigation. Add your name to call for one today: "" We will all need to watch this closely to ensure that Trump keeps his hands off of this process. But for now, thanks for raising your voice to protect our democracy. Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: Vote for Trumpcare + Blue district = Flippable seat
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78cd/24c69fd9/ea536892/18e512b4/3104544730/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact&source=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact")
---

Peter,

217 Republicans in the House voted to repeal Obamacare.

Every single one of those votes was a vote against affordable, comprehensive health care coverage for women and families, and that's despicable.

We're planning to go after as many of those 217 seats as we can, but there are 14 in particular we've set our sights on. Why? Because they represent districts that voted for Hillary Clinton, and that makes them HIGHLY vulnerable.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to defend our health care and replace these anti-woman, anti-family Republicans.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78cd/24c69fd9/ea536892/18e512b5/3104544730/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170517_email_VulnerableGOP?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact&source=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78cd/24c69fd9/ea536892/18e512b6/3104544730/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170517_email_VulnerableGOP?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact&source=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact")
Trumpcare would decimate coverage for folks with pre-existing conditions -- while vastly expanding the definition of these conditions to include C-sections, domestic violence, and even heavy periods.

Taking such an extreme vote while representing a swing district opens the door to introduce voters to a better option: pro-choice Democratic women who will fight to protect their health care.

We're already hard at work looking for candidates who can take on these Republicans. But we need to have the resources to have their backs when they decide to run.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who will protect our health care and unseat anti-woman Republicans:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Flip-Seats-Defend-Care](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78cd/24c69fd9/ea536892/18e512b7/3104544730/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170517_email_VulnerableGOP?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFlipSeatsDefendC&utm_campaign=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact&source=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Chief of Staff, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78cd/24c69fd9/ea536892/18e512b0/3104544730/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170517_email_VulnerableGOP?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact&source=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78cd/24c69fd9/ea536892/18e512b1/3104544730/VEsA/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact&source=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78cd/24c69fd9/ea536892/18e512b2/3104544730/VEsB/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact&source=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c78cd/24c69fd9/ea536892/18e512b3/3104544730/VEsO/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact&source=WQEFE521N_digital_email_20170517_VulnerableGOP_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.
